S

send_hl7_msg(Analyzer, String, String) - Static method in class plugin.Connect_util
Send hl7 message to an upstream.
setArchive_msg(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets whether messages should be archived.
setId_analyzer(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the analyzer identifier.
setIp_analyzer(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the analyzer's IP address.
setMappingPath(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the mapping configuration path.
setMode(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the operating mode (e.g., "client" or "server").
setOperationMode(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the operating mode of the analyzer (batch or query).
setPort_analyzer(int) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the analyzer's connection port.
setType_cnx(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the connection type (e.g., "socket").
setType_msg(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the message type (e.g., "HL7").
setUrl_upstream_lab27(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the upstream URL for lab27 transactions.
setUrl_upstream_lab29(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the upstream URL for lab29 transactions.
setVersion(String) - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Sets the analyzer version.
START_MSG_MLLP - Static variable in class plugin.Connect_util
MLLP start block character.
stopListening() - Method in interface plugin.Analyzer
Stops listening and releases sockets (server and client).
